q: We will finish the work in time. We strive together.
a: We will finish the work in time by striving together.

q: Mother will recover from her illness. She goes to the doctor.
a: Mother will recover from her illness by going to the doctor.

q: We can be strong and healthy. We do exercises regularly.
a: We can be strong and healthy by doing exercises regularly.

q: You can pass the examination easily. You study regularly.
a: You can pass the examination easily by studying regularly.

q: You can solve the problem. You ask for some suggestions.
a: You can solve the problem by asking for some suggestions.

q: You can make the toy bird sing. You turn the little key.
a: You can make the toy bird sing by turning the little key.

q: You can make this child quiet and still. You feed him some snacks.
a: You can make this child quiet and still by feeding him some snacks.

q: You can ring the bell. You press a key.
a: You can ring the bell by pressing a key.

q: Win Maung passed the examination. He studied regularly.
a: Win Maung passed the examination by studying regularly.

q: You can start the car running. You turn the key.
a: You can start the car running by turning the key.

q: Our team reached the final stage. We did the regular training.
a: Our team reached the final stage by doing the regular training.

q: We can win the match. We work very hard.
a: We can win the match by working very hard.

q: We can keep fit and healthy. We take physical exercise regularly.
a: We can keep fit and healthy by taking physical exercise regularly.

q: The thief entered into the house. He climbed up the wall.
a: The thief entered into the house by climbing up the wall.

q: The firemen put out the fire. They threw sand over it.
a: The firemen put out the fire by throwing sand over it.

q: She impressed the audience. She sang beautifully.
a: She impressed the audience by singing beautifully.

q: He earned extra money. He worked overtime.
a: He earned extra money by working overtime.

q: We improved our English. We watched English movies.
a: We improved our English by watching English movies.

q: The teacher caught the students' attention. She told a funny story.
a: The teacher caught the students' attention by telling a funny story.

q: You can get better results. You follow the instructions.
a: You can get better results by following the instructions.

q: I saved time. I took a shortcut.
a: I saved time by taking a shortcut.

q: They reduced waste. They reused plastic bottles.
a: They reduced waste by reusing plastic bottles.

q: He fixed the machine. He replaced the broken part.
a: He fixed the machine by replacing the broken part.

q: We got to the station early. We left home at 6 a.m.
a: We got to the station early by leaving home at 6 a.m.

q: She avoided getting wet. She used an umbrella.
a: She avoided getting wet by using an umbrella.

q: He memorized the poem. He read it many times.
a: He memorized the poem by reading it many times.

q: They impressed the judges. They performed with confidence.
a: They impressed the judges by performing with confidence.

q: The students learned faster. They used flashcards.
a: The students learned faster by using flashcards.

q: I passed the interview. I prepared well.
a: I passed the interview by preparing well.

q: She lost weight. She ate healthy food.
a: She lost weight by eating healthy food.

q: They improved their grades. They studied every night.
a: They improved their grades by studying every night.

q: He won the prize. He submitted the best essay.
a: He won the prize by submitting the best essay.

q: The dog escaped. It dug a hole under the fence.
a: The dog escaped by digging a hole under the fence.

q: The company increased profits. It cut unnecessary costs.
a: The company increased profits by cutting unnecessary costs.

q: We cleaned the room. We worked together.
a: We cleaned the room by working together.

q: She solved the puzzle. She used logic.
a: She solved the puzzle by using logic.

q: The baby stopped crying. The mother sang a lullaby.
a: The baby stopped crying by listening to a lullaby. / The mother stopped the baby from crying by singing a lullaby.

q: I saved money. I stopped eating out.
a: I saved money by stopping eating out.

q: They reached the top. They climbed steadily.
a: They reached the top by climbing steadily.

q: He made new friends. He joined the drama club.
a: He made new friends by joining the drama club.

q: She avoided an accident. She hit the brakes in time.
a: She avoided an accident by hitting the brakes in time.

q: I stayed informed. I read the newspaper every day.
a: I stayed informed by reading the newspaper every day.

q: The boy learned to swim. He practiced daily.
a: The boy learned to swim by practicing daily.

q: The villagers crossed the river. They built a raft.
a: The villagers crossed the river by building a raft.

q: He stayed warm. He wore a thick coat.
a: He stayed warm by wearing a thick coat.

q: She opened the jar. She used a spoon.
a: She opened the jar by using a spoon.

q: The cat got out. It pushed open the door.
a: The cat got out by pushing open the door.

q: We kept the baby safe. We covered the sharp corners.
a: We kept the baby safe by covering the sharp corners.

q: They avoided the traffic. They took a different route.
a: They avoided the traffic by taking a different route.

q: He finished early. He focused on the task.
a: He finished early by focusing on the task.

q: I improved my memory. I played brain games.
a: I improved my memory by playing brain games.

q: She became fluent in French. She lived in Paris.
a: She became fluent in French by living in Paris.

q: We saved electricity. We turned off the lights.
a: We saved electricity by turning off the lights.

q: He got fit. He jogged every morning.
a: He got fit by jogging every morning.

q: They reduced stress. They meditated daily.
a: They reduced stress by meditating daily.

q: She calmed the baby. She rocked him gently.
a: She calmed the baby by rocking him gently.

q: We maintained discipline. We followed the rules.
a: We maintained discipline by following the rules.

q: He reached the top shelf. He used a ladder.
a: He reached the top shelf by using a ladder.

q: I fixed the error. I checked the code carefully.
a: I fixed the error by checking the code carefully.

q: The students stayed alert. They drank coffee.
a: The students stayed alert by drinking coffee.
